name: Blue Eye Flute of Summoning Dragon
desc: Each player can Special Summon 1 LIGHT Warrior or Spellcaster monster from their hand or Deck, then, if your Summoned monster mentions "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" on its text, you can Special Summon up to 2 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your hand or Deck, otherwise, the Summoned monsters' effects are negated. You can only activate 1 "Blue-Eyes Flute of Summoning Dragon" per turn.
